ft_florence.method: Fine-tuned Florence-2-base on 8 species (3 epochs, 1500 samples), then pseudo-labels + OWLv2 consensus + 30% replay, YOLO 50 epochs lr=0.001
ft_florence.conclusion: NEGATIVE: fine-tuning degraded both old (-11.3% mAP) and new species. Likely cause: incorrect training target format or insufficient epochs.

agent_consensus.method: Florence-2-base + OWLv2 zero-shot consensus (min 2 votes, IoU>0.3) + YOLO old-species labels + 30% replay, lr=0.001, 50 epochs
agent_consensus.conclusion: BEST METHOD: +0.016 F1 on new species with manageable forgetting (-0.020 F1 on old)
